top_signals.title: Air Force One begins commissioning flights, final step before presidential use
top_signals.summary: The service announced the delivery of the Qatari-donated aircraft to Joint Base Andrews on Friday and the kickoff of its commissioning flights.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
